notes:
Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.16.9 Numerous updates to cosmic clarity (prepping for cosmic clarity correct only models), celestial catalog, debayering, blink, function and view bundles, ux improvements for panels, subwindows, stat stretch, and more.

V1.16.8 Maintenance update for improved Stacking Suite and Stellar Alignment performance

V1.16.7 GPU Calibration: Stacking Suite now uses the GPU for 2-5x faster calibration. Continuum Subtraction adds Q Tweak interactive preview. UX and backend updates.

V1.16.6.post2 Cosmic Clarity fix. Toolbar icon size adjustable in settings. Mask awareness added to Cosmic Clarity, Aberration Remover, SyQon, and Multiscale Decomposition. Numpy compatibility updates across AI engines. Rejection algorithms improved. Memmap and subwindow bug fixes.

V1.16.4 Star alignment engine rewritten with custom parallel implementation — 2x+ faster. AstroAlign no longer required. Explorer Panel active view indicator.

V1.16.3 ADBE fix: background subtraction now in linear space, preventing star color corruption. Division correction option added.

V1.16.2 Stacking log writes directly to stacking directory. Function Bundle and View Bundle upgrades. Remove Stars updated for Axiom 2.2.

V1.16.1 Workflows get new Run UI. WIMI and WIMS show community images in search area. Sky Atlas gallery option.

V1.16.0 Community Sky Atlas launched — upload plate-solved images to build a community sky map. PSF Viewer overhaul. Bug fixes and UX tweaks.
